mapper.select: SELECT message_id, sender_id, receiver_id, message_type, title, content, msg_format, image_url, related_type, is_read, read_time, create_time FROM message WHERE message_type = 1 AND receiver_id IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM message_receiver mr WHERE mr.message_id = message.message_id ) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT m.message_id, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.message_type, m.title, m.content, m.msg_format, m.image_url, m.related_type, m.is_read, m.read_time, m.create_time FROM message m LEFT JOIN message_receiver mr ON m.message_id = mr.message_id WHERE m.message_type = 1 AND ( (m.receiver_id = #{userId}) OR (mr.receiver_id = #{userId}) ) ORDER BY m.create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT message_id, sender_id, receiver_id, message_type, title, content, msg_format, image_url, related_type, is_read, read_time, create_time FROM message WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND message_type = 1

SELECT message_id, sender_id, receiver_id, message_type, title, content, msg_format, image_url, related_type, is_read, read_time, create_time FROM message WHERE message_type = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
LIMIT #{start}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE message_type = 1

SELECT DISTINCT m.message_id, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.message_type, m.title, m.content, m.msg_format, m.image_url, m.related_type, COALESCE(mr.is_read, 0) as is_read, mr.read_time, m.create_time FROM message m INNER JOIN message_receiver mr ON m.message_id = mr.message_id WHERE m.message_type = 1 AND mr.receiver_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(mr.is_read, 0) = 0 ORDER BY m.create_time DESC

SELECT message_id, sender_id, receiver_id, message_type, title, content, msg_format, image_url, related_type, is_read, read_time, create_time FROM message WHERE message_type = 1 AND receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message ( sender_id, receiver_id, message_type, title, content, msg_format, image_url, related_type, is_read, create_time ) VALUES ( NULL, #{receiverId}, 1, #{title}, #{content}, 0, NULL, NULL, 0, NOW() )
